title: Company overview
content:
Founder & Headquarters: Founded by Ashish Garg. Headquartered in Dublin, Ireland, with a strong global presence in the UK, USA, and India. The role is based in their Gurgaon office.
Products/Services: They specialize in business automation and software implementation, heavily utilizing platforms like Odoo, HubSpot, Zoho, and Zendesk to build customized workflows for clients across various industries.
Work Culture & Growth: Reviews on Glassdoor and partner ecosystems describe a fast-paced, highly accountable environment. The company operates on a hybrid model, but the UK Shift (2:00 PM – 11:00 PM IST) is mandatory. Growth is promising if you can take ownership of projects and communicate directly with international clients.
